author: sarah.mitchell
body: Love the red-flag list in section 2. Should we add a note about asymmetrical crawling patterns?

author: greg.howard
body: Yes - added a paragraph under Early Concerns. Flag asymmetrical crawl if persisting past 12 months.

author: greg.howard
body: The tummy time progressions look great. Can we add a 'What if baby hates tummy time' troubleshooting box?

author: sarah.mitchell
body: Added it - five strategies including inclined surface and parent-chest positioning.

author: sarah.mitchell
body: The furniture-cruising section needs a safety callout - mention anchor furniture to wall.

author: greg.howard
body: Good catch. Added a safety box. Also noted tip-over hazard for bookshelves and TV stands.

author: greg.howard
body: Should we include the balance beam masking-tape-on-floor trick here? Parents love that one.

author: sarah.mitchell
body: Yes! Added in the low-cost tools section. Also included the stepping stones foam mat game.

author: sarah.mitchell
body: Agree on plain language standard. Should we create a banned-jargon list? E.g., no 'proprioception' without defining it.

author: greg.howard
body: Great idea - started the glossary in a new section at the bottom. Will build it as we write each chapter.

author: marcus.webb
body: Budget looks reasonable. Can we add a line for stage rental? The park does not have a permanent stage.

author: greg.howard
body: Good point - added $600 for stage rental. Updated total to $4,800. Will confirm with vendor.

author: sarah.mitchell
body: This chapter is going to be so helpful. Suggest adding a tactile bin activity - rice or dried pasta.

author: greg.howard
body: Added sensory bin activity with safety note (choking hazard under 3 years - use larger items).

author: sarah.mitchell
body: The referral section is clear. Should we add what insurance typically covers and how to request a PT order from pediatrician?

author: greg.howard
body: Added a subsection on insurance and a script parents can use when calling the pediatrician's office.

author: marcus.webb
body: Great report. Recommend we pre-order the dumpster for fall cleanup now while rates are lower.

author: greg.howard
body: Agreed - added action item to contact Columbus Waste for fall event estimate.

author: sarah.mitchell
body: Milestone chart in section 3 looks accurate based on APTA guidelines. Just double-check the 18-month walking milestone note.

author: greg.howard
body: Draft is in good shape for beta review. Should we send Chapter 1 and 2 to Rachel for parent perspective feedback?

author: sarah.mitchell
body: Yes - Rachel would be a great first reader since her baby is due soon. She will be our target audience.
